series_metadata.series_description: All legal agreements, memorandums of understanding, capital expenditure submittals, and other documents related to the expenditure of allocated funding by a grantee.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: In order accommodate any requested audits by U.S. Department of Treasury, all materials are be kept 3 (three) years from term of bond or converted electronic medium. ; Electronic: In order accommodate any requested audits by U.S. Department of Treasury, all materials are be kept 3 (three) years from term of bond
